title: The Gay Mod
description: This mod adds a new diamond called Gaymonds that can drop while mining diamonds.
body:
## Have you ever wanted to be gay in Minecraft? 
Mine for diamonds and have a small chance to pickup **Gaymonds**! Craft them into the **"Gay Sword**" to inflict gayety on your enemies, or into **Gaymond Blocks** to travel _super fast_! You can even eat Gaymonds, but you will be left with their dust, which is useless.

### BUT BE CAREFUL!
Holding the Gay Sword or eating Gaymonds will make you gay, and you will not be able to walk straight, **so always have a bucket of water at the ready!**
